title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to use the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to automate Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace migrations with multi-agent systems. The approach replaces manual assessment processes with an AI-powered Enterprise Assessment Agent that handles license mapping, report generation, context caching, and priority inference for deployment on Google's Agent Engine.
